en.gantt.behavior.drag_links.hint: Allow dragging between tasks to create dependencies.

en.gantt.behavior.drag_move.hint: Allow dragging task bars to change dates.

en.gantt.behavior.drag_progress.hint: Allow dragging the progress marker on bars.
en.gantt.behavior.drag_progress.label: Edit progress

en.gantt.behavior.drag_resize.label: Resize tasks
en.gantt.behavior.open_tree.hint: Show all tasks expanded when opening the Gantt.
en.gantt.behavior.open_tree.label: Expand tree on open

en.gantt.color.links.label: Links
en.gantt.color.milestone.label: Milestone
en.gantt.color.task_bar.label: Task bar
en.gantt.color.task_project.hint: Color of summary bars for tasks with children.
en.gantt.color.task_project.label: Project bar
en.gantt.color.today.hint: Color of the vertical marker for the current day.
en.gantt.color.today.label: Today line
en.gantt.config.colors_desc: Customize the colors of Gantt elements.
en.gantt.config.columns_desc: Select which columns to show in the Gantt grid.
en.gantt.config.end_date_example: E.g. a 1-day task starting on May 1.
en.gantt.config.project_scope_desc: These settings apply to this project only.
en.gantt.config.title: Gantt Settings
en.gantt.settings.card_desc: Configure Gantt defaults at global or personal scope.
en.gantt.settings.card_desc_suffix: Per-project settings are on each planning page.
en.gantt.settings.col_global_hint: Settings applied by default to all users and projects.
en.gantt.settings.col_user_hint: Your personal preferences — override the globals.
en.gantt.settings.end_date_example: E.g. a 1-day task starting on May 1 ends on May 1 (inclusive) or May 2 (exclusive).
en.gantt.settings.end_date_warning: Changing this mode recalculates the end dates of ALL tasks.
en.gantt.settings.end_date_warning_suffix: This operation may take a few seconds.
en.gantt.settings.title: Gantt Settings
en.gantt.settings.zoom_hint: Zoom level applied when opening the Gantt.
